title: § 1026.40 Requirements for home equity plans.
text:
§ 1026.40 Requirements for home equity plans.

(a) Form of disclosures. The disclosures required by paragraph (d) of this section shall be made clearly and conspicuously and shall be grouped together and segregated from all unrelated information.

(b) Time of disclosures. The disclosures and brochure required by paragraphs (d) and (e) of this section shall be delivered or placed in the mail not later than three business days after the creditor receives the consumer's application.

(c) Duties of third parties. Persons other than the creditor who provide applications to consumers for home equity plans shall provide the brochure required under paragraph (e) of this section at the time an application is provided to the consumer.
